homePage.heroHeading: Digital tribes in the map of your region
homePage.heroDescription: A social network created to map digital tribes in your area. With Orbis, you can discover digital tribes around you.
homePage.feature2Text: Claim places with your tribes and mark your territory on the map with the tribe's symbol.
homePage.feature3Text: Compete for ownership of places with other tribes by claiming them.
homePage.feature4Text: The more claims there are in a region, the larger the territory of the tribe around it will be. So tell your friends to claim places.
homePage.feature5Text: Claim places with your tribe and mark your territory on the map with the tribe's symbol.
homePage.feature6Text: Create a members club within your tribe and monetize your use of Orbis. Sell subscriptions, tickets, benefits, and much more.

errors.unableToFindRequestedResource: Unable to find the requested resource

monitizeCommunityBanner.heading: Monetize your tribe
monitizeCommunityBanner.description: Sell subscriptions, tickets, benefits, and installment packages to the members of your tribe.
monitizeCommunityBanner.closableBannerHeading: Monetize your tribe by creating offers and benefits.
monitizeCommunityBanner.closableBannerHighlightedText: Click here to find out more.

mapBanner.heading: Explore the map of digital tribes in your city
mapBanner.description: Discover vibrant digital communities near you. Click Open Map to navigate and connect with tribes in your area.

githubBanner.heading: Contribute to the Decentralized Map
githubBanner.description: Orbis is an open source project where the tribal map is recorded on the Solana blockchain. Create your own Orbis clone and participate.

subscriptionBanner.offerActivatedHeading: Explore the exclusive opportunities available to members of our community. Click the Members Club button.
subscriptionBanner.offerInactiveHeading: Sell subscriptions, tickets, benefits, and installment packages to the members of your tribe.

paymentStatusPage.successDescription: You can now enjoy Orbis using your registration. You will receive a confirmation email, download the app, and welcome to Orbis!
paymentStatusPage.errorDescription: But don't worry, go back in the process, check if the information provided is correct or if the payment method is appropriate.
paymentStatusPage.paymentCannotBeCompletedErrorDescription: This usually happens when you have already subscribed to the plan. Please use our app to update your offer.

meta.title: Orbis Digital Tribes
meta.description: A social network created to map digital tribes in your area. With Orbis, you can discover digital tribes around you.

exchange.heroCopyHeading: Become a clone operator. Run your own Orbis node.
exchange.heroCopyBody: Orbis GeoNet (Geographical Internet) is the decentralized protocol layer that powers a global social map. Every place claimed, tribe, and territory is stored as a verifiable hash on Solana — permanent, open, and owned by no single company. As a clone operator, you run your own independent app on the shared map, earn from your users, and keep 99% of byte fees. Register a clone for 50 $ORBIS and start building.

exchangeWidget.termsAgreement: By connecting you agree to the Terms of Service
